titleStmt.title: SII 18.192: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 192. (B.K. No. 85 of 1933-34.) GUḌADĀNVĒRI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva is dated in Śaka 110[4], Śubhakṛit, Mārgaśira śu. Pūrṇimā, Thursday, lunar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-samkramaṇa In Mārgaśira of Śubhakṛit there was no lunar eclipse, but in Śōbhakṛit there was one which fell on Thursday. Śubhakṛit cited in the record seems to be a mistake for Śōbhakṛit In that case the Śaka year would be 1105. The Christian equivalent would then be A.D. 1183 December 1, Thursday.

It registers a gift of land in the village Bāḍadālūru in Binnvūru Twelve by Vāsudēva—Daṇḍanāyaka, a subordinate of Vikramāditya II of the Gutta family, for the worship and offerings to god Mallikārjuna of that village, after effecting repairs, etc., to the temple. The village was granted to him by Vikramādītya I and Jōyidēva II, the grand-father and uncle respectively, of Vikramāditya II, who is here referred to as Kumāra Vikramāditya. He is also referred to as the son (putra) of Jōyidēva II, possibly because of the prevailing Indian practice of calling a nephew as son.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē tryelōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . varaphēnānēka
śuṁbhada bahaḷatarataraṁgaṁgaḷoṁdondanoṁdaṁ bha
radiṁ taḷupoyye mēlingogedu poḷeva sīrmmuttiveṁbaṁte sū
suttiralōraṁturbbi tuṁturppanigaḷasadaḷaṁ celuvanā
ḷdattu kūrmmōddhurapāṭhīnādibhāsvaduguḷuguḷitagaḷadhvānaraudraṁ samudraṁ . varakū
rmmēṁdraṁ sukaṁdaṁ phaṇipativimaḷōttāḷanāḷaṁ diśāsiṁdhuramudya
dugōtrabhūbhritukuḷadaḷanicayaṁ kēsaraṁ dēśabhāsvatupurasaṁdōhaṁ sa
maṁtuṁnatadivijanagaṁ karṇnikākāramaṁ tāḷdire jaṁbūdvīpavabujōdubhavaja
nitasarōjātavintoppitōrkkuṁ . piriduṁ madhyasthavādvīpadoḷamaranagaṁ taṁ
nagēṁdrakke teṁkalu bharatakṣētraṁ janānaṁdamanodavipudā kṣētra
doḷu nāḍeyuṁ sauṁdaralakṣumījanumagēhaṁ nutabhuvanavadhūkuṁtaḷaṁ
tānenalu vistarisikkuṁ kuṁtaḷōrvvītaḷavakhiḷasudhāḷaṁkritōdyaduviḷāsaṁ . Aṁ
tenipa kuṁtaḷōrvvīkāntege patiyenisi vairinripakuḷaviḷayō
grāṁtakanesedaṁ dōrbbhaḷakauṁtēyaṁ bijjaṇaṁ parākramabhīmaṁ . Ātana
prabhāvōṁnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . Ade viḷeyābdhighōṣadagaḷārava vuṇmidudettale
ttalittide caturaṁgasainyapadaghātarajaḥ paṭaḷaṁ samīpavāytide niśitāstra
kōṭiruci bijjaṇadēvana dhāḷi muṭṭevaṁdudu śaraṇilla sattevenu
tippudarātinripāḷajāḷakaṁ . dhuradhīraṁ bijjaṇōrvvīpatinutana tanūjātanu
da duvinūtōddhuratējaṁ puṁṇyapuṁjaṁgaḷacuriyakuḷāṁbhōja
sanumitranuduvrittaragaṁḍaṁ yuddhaśauṁḍaṁ sogayipanenasuṁ rā
yanārāyaṇaṁ vistarakīrttiśrīviḷāsaṁ vasudheyūḷadaṭiṁ dāhumallakṣi
tīśaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ gaḷacuriyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kadanapra
caṁḍa mānakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarāditya kaligaḷaṁ kusaṁ gajasāmaṁta śaraṇā
gatavajrapanjaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavriṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamaruga
tūriyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ pratāpalankēśvaraṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ nissaṁka
mallaṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ rāyarācāryya śanivārasiddhi giridurggama
lla caladaṁkarāmanityakhiḷanāmāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmadāhavamalladēva
vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivridhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
�ttamireyuṁ . tatupādapādapadumōpajīvigaḷumappa śrī
manumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīravikramādityadēvarasara prabhāvōṁnatiyeṁ
teṁdaḍe . vri . svasti samastavastunicayāṁnvitavānatabhūbhridāśrayaṁ
vistritavēṣṭitāvanitaḷaṁ prithusatvasamaṁnvitaṁ nijāpāstakhaḷabra
jāvakiramujvaḷakīrttisudhāṁśusaṁbhavaṁ prastutavāytuvikramanri
pāḷakuḷāṁbudhi nityasusthitaṁ . śitikaṁṭhaprasphuraccaṁdrakakuḷakaḷi
tōttaṁsakaṁ śōṇaguṁjākritamāḷālaṁbalaṁbūṣakaghaṭita kaṭī
sūtrakaṁ rājijaṁbūdugatacaṁcatupallavāvēllitaghanajaghanaṁ krūrakāntārado
ḷu kūḍe toḷaluguṁ vikramādityanoḷuṟadiṟiduduvrittavidviḍukaḷatraṁ . tatpu
tranappa śrīmanumahāmaṁḍeḷēśvaraṁ jōyidēvarasara prabhāvaveṁteṁ
deḍe . vri . viṟisi cāpamaṁ tiṟipi kūrggaṇeyaṁ neṟe hūḍi vikramaṁdō
ṟidaḍabudhi battidudu rāmana cāpada balume hōgade mīṟuva vīravairinara
pāḷabaḷāṁbudhi jōma hurvvunīnēṟise battidattu ninagaṁ raghujaṁgavadā
vudaṁtaraṁ . sāhasadoḷu dharādharadharaṁ bhujaśauryyanijapratā
pa�ṁdōhadoḷarjjunaṁ baḷavirōdhinripāḷasamastasainikabyūhava
nāvagaṁ tavipa caṁḍaparākramaneṁdaḍī raṇōcchāha jayāṁga
nāsakta jōmanripāḷanoḷāridirccuvaru . tatuputranappa śrīmanuma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāraṁ vīravikramādityadēvarasara prabhāvaveṁteṁ
daḍe . vri . Uragēṁdra dhātriyaṁ dhāriṇi himagiriyaṁ hermmyaśaiḷaṁ kubhiMistake for bhṛ.
jjāvaranaṁ gaurīvaraṁ caṁdrananamaḷina caṁdraṁ kaḷāstōmamaṁ nirbhbharadiṁdaṁ
tāḷduvaṁtapratimaripukuḷōddhūtasāmrājyalakṣmībharamaṁ hēḷāsu
sādhyaṁ tanagene taḷedaṁ vikramādityabhūpaṁ . © . tatpādapadu
mōpajīvigaḷumappa śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sarbbādhikāri śrīkara
ṇaṁ sēnādhipati bāhattaraniyōgādhipati lāḷakaḍeyakāṟaradhiṣṭhāyakaṁ
mahāpracaṇḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ vāsudēvanāyakara prabhāvaveṁteṁdaḍe . vri . A
nupamadānadiṁdu mahimōṁnatiyaṁ heṟatēnaneṁbenoḷpinakaṇi dānamānanidhi
saduvinayāṁbudhi daṁḍanāthavāsugigeṇeyappaneṁbavanadēṁ baliyō śi
biyō dadhīciyō dinapatanūjanō khēcararājanō guttanō cārudattanō . kaṁ . turagā
rūḍhaprauḍhige doreyāru vigrahavinōdadoḷu jōmamahīvaramaṁtri vāsu dēvaṁgaribi
rudardduṣṭaturagarāvutarāya . vri . sthiratējaṁ puṇyapuṁjaṁ sujanajanamanōjaṁ yaśaḥśrī
samājaṁ dharegellaṁ tāne nallaṁ seṇasuva ripuhritsella dhura
dhīraṁ nirvvikāraṁ duritavidūraṁ sadācārasāraṁ . ka yanā sama ramu
khadaśagrīvanudyatuprabhāvaṁ . ka . māḍida pāpaṁ śivananōḍaloḍaṁ keḍugu guṇahīnanumaṁ bē
ḍida pāpaṁ keḍuguṁ bēḍaloḍaṁ vāsudēvadaṁḍādhipanaṁ . nappa kēśava
daṁḍanāyakana prabhāvaveṁteṁdaḍe . Asidhārā darahitamahī pāḷa caṁ
drātapaśrīgeṇeyene neṟe perccida satukīrtti rāditya
kēśirājaṁge sahāyōdya śauryyaṁ jana
taṁ vivēkanidhi saccaritāśrayanātmavaṁśa puṇyabhājana
nanavadyaneṁdu dharebaṇne doḷeydekēsi guṇa
© tadanujanappa nāraṇadaṇnāyakara prabhāvaveṁteṁdaḍe do
ḍḍi niṁdaribaḷabrāta takkavolādavanipā
nī nāraṇadēvanāṁtiṟi yalīyalu sā lanā hariputraṁ
sutaṁ tāneṁdaḍēvadiṇnipeṁ . kaṁ . turagare biruda si
dame tā raṭṭeya pekkaṇadiṁ karamesedudu narapani vīrasaṁgara nikṣu
cāpada balamillade nibaviḷāsagarbbada baladiṁ lalaneyarge nāra rāja kaliyuga madanaṁ vivēka
lakṣmīsadanaṁ . © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ hiriya
vikramādityadēvarasaruṁ . tatuputranappa śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara
jōyidēvarasaruṁ kūḍirdu sānurāgadiṁda vāsudēvadaṁḍanāyakargge
biṁnavūra haneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍadālūrumaṁ sarbbanamaśyavāgi dhārāpū
rbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaḍadaṁ paṁmaprītiyiṁ kaikoṇḍā vūra śrīmallikārjjuna
dēvara dēvālayada jīrṇnōddhāravaṁ sippiyādiyāgi kaluvesanaṁ punarbhbharaṇa
vāgi sa pratiṣṭhitaṁ māḍi yādēvargge yaṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga nityapūje nai
vēdya naṁdādīvige caitrapavitraviṁtinitumaṁ lēsāgiyūrjitaṁ māḍi naḍa
yisuvantāgi . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānu
ṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnaruṁ sakalasadācāraparipālanai
karasikaruṁ nikhiḷāgamārtthaśāstratatvaviśāradarumappa sōmēsvarapaṁḍita
rggesthānācāryyatvamaṁ supratiṣṭhitaṁ māḍikoṭṭu śakavaruṣa 1104 ne
ya śubhakritsantsarada mārggaśira suddha paurṇnami brihaspativāra sō
magrahaṇa vuttarāyaṇasaṁkramāṇa byatīpātaṁ kūḍiba
hāpuṇyatithiyalli śrīmallikārjunadēvargge dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍibiṭṭa bhūmi
riṁdavīsānyadalu keṟeya baḍagaṇa kōḍiyiṁ mūḍalu yereyabhū
mattaraiyduṁ mūlasthānada dēvarggaṁ takkalu makki mattaru nāluku . hiriya baṁ
loḷāgiyuttamada sthaḷadali gadde kamma mūvattu ṁda baḍaga
lu haḷeya hāḷu mūlasthānadalli kalidēvarige biṭṭa bhūmi śrīma
llikārjjunadēva reya samīpadalu yeremattareraḍu . mallikārjjunadē ma
kkiya sā mattaroṁdu . mallikārjjunadēvara gaddeya samīpadalu
svasti yamaniyama dhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśī saṁ
paṁnaruṁ pāsanāgnihōtra dēvā
manmahājana
damaged
ge bbekēri paḍuva
viya haḍuvalu
la diyāgi matta yidaṟo kēśavadēvarggeremattare
raḍu . daṟoḷagereya mattare satrakkerema
ttareraḍu . cikkabayaloḷage gadde mattareraḍu . yadaṟoḷage
śrīkēśavadēvarige gaddekaṁma hadinaydu ḷa mahāśrī . © . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . kōṭi payaṁgavileyanekkōṭi tapōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ
haṁnikkōṭiyanekkōṭi tīrtthade kōṭi mahādinadoḷa nintidanaḷidaṁ . Ōṁ namaśśivāya .
© haḍagileya dāsōjana maga kallōjana barapamidācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluge .
